This game has long been one of my full favorite! It is super fun and has a lot of cool stuff that make it exciting to play. I have played the last two updates from the app lab, and each time they get better and better. One of the best parts is that it has custom items that you can play with, such as your own special gear. You also find cool weapons such as a ray-gun and a flemethrover that actually work well because they are server-controlled. This makes the action feel smooth and powerful. Even there is a finger painter badge that you can wear, which is really fun if you like to be creative and show your style. It is such small things that make the game even more fun to play. I like this game so much that if I ever have to remove it, I will really be sad. This is good! If you are looking for something new, fun and action-pack, then this is the perfect game for you. Trust me - now load it and try it. You won't be disappointed!
